auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Bouncer API key sent with the x-api-key header.

actions.name: create_batch_request
actions.description: Create an async Bouncer batch verification request for multiple email addresses.

items.description: The email address to verify with Bouncer.

emails.description: The email addresses to verify with Bouncer.

callbackUrl.description: The callback URL Bouncer should notify after batch processing completes.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for creating a Bouncer async batch verification request.

batchId.description: The batch identifier returned by Bouncer.

created.description: Whether the Bouncer batch request was accepted.

outputSchema.description: The normalized response returned after creating a Bouncer batch verification request.

actions.name: create_toxicity_list_job
actions.description: Create a Bouncer toxicity list job for multiple email addresses.

items.description: The email address to verify with Bouncer.

emails.description: The email addresses to verify with Bouncer.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for creating a Bouncer toxicity list job.

id.description: The toxicity list job identifier returned by Bouncer.

status.description: The toxicity list job status returned by Bouncer.

outputSchema.description: The normalized response returned after creating a Bouncer toxicity list job.

actions.name: delete_batch_request
actions.description: Delete a Bouncer batch verification request and its stored results.

batchId.description: The batch identifier returned by Bouncer.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for deleting a Bouncer batch verification request.

batchId.description: The batch identifier returned by Bouncer.

deleted.description: Whether the Bouncer batch verification request was deleted.

outputSchema.description: The normalized response returned after deleting a Bouncer batch verification request.

actions.name: delete_toxicity_list_job
actions.description: Delete a Bouncer toxicity list job and its stored results.

id.description: The toxicity list job identifier returned by Bouncer.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for deleting a Bouncer toxicity list job.

id.description: The toxicity list job identifier returned by Bouncer.

deleted.description: Whether the Bouncer toxicity list job was deleted.

outputSchema.description: The normalized response returned after deleting a Bouncer toxicity list job.

actions.name: finish_batch
actions.description: Request early completion for a Bouncer batch verification request.

batchId.description: The batch identifier returned by Bouncer.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for finishing a Bouncer batch verification request.

batchId.description: The batch identifier returned by Bouncer.

finishRequested.description: Whether the batch finish request was accepted by Bouncer.

outputSchema.description: The normalized response returned after finishing a Bouncer batch verification request.

actions.name: get_batch_results
actions.description: Download normalized results from a completed Bouncer batch verification request.

batchId.description: The batch identifier returned by Bouncer.

download.description: The batch download filter supported by Bouncer.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for downloading Bouncer batch verification results.

batchId.description: The batch identifier returned by Bouncer.

download.description: The batch download filter supported by Bouncer.

email.description: The normalized email address returned by Bouncer.

status.description: The verification status returned by Bouncer.

reason.description: The provider reason returned by Bouncer.

score.description: The Bouncer quality score from 0 to 100.

toxic.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

name.description: The domain name returned by Bouncer.

acceptAll.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

disposable.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

free.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

domain.description: The domain details returned by Bouncer.

role.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

disabled.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

fullMailbox.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

account.description: The mailbox details returned by Bouncer.

type.description: The DNS record type returned by Bouncer.

record.description: The DNS record value returned by Bouncer.

dns.description: The DNS details returned by Bouncer.

provider.description: The provider name returned by Bouncer.

toxicity.description: The Bouncer toxicity score from 0 to 5.

items.description: The single-email verification result returned by Bouncer.

results.description: The email verification results returned by Bouncer batch download.

outputSchema.description: The normalized batch verification results returned by Bouncer.

actions.name: get_batch_status
actions.description: Get the current processing status of a Bouncer batch verification request.

batchId.description: The batch identifier returned by Bouncer.

includeStats.description: Whether Bouncer should include batch statistics in the status response.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for retrieving the status of a Bouncer batch verification request.

batchId.description: The batch identifier returned by Bouncer.

status.description: The current batch status returned by Bouncer.

processed.description: The number of processed email addresses reported by Bouncer.

credits.description: The number of credits consumed by the batch as reported by Bouncer.

deliverable.description: The number of deliverable email addresses reported by Bouncer.

risky.description: The number of risky email addresses reported by Bouncer.

undeliverable.description: The number of undeliverable email addresses reported by Bouncer.

unknown.description: The number of unknown email addresses reported by Bouncer.

stats.description: The batch verification counters returned by Bouncer.

outputSchema.description: The normalized status response returned by Bouncer for a batch verification request.

actions.name: get_credits
actions.description: Get the current Bouncer credit balance.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for retrieving the current Bouncer credit balance.

credits.description: The available credits returned by Bouncer.

actions.name: get_toxicity_list_job_status
actions.description: Get the current processing status of a Bouncer toxicity list job.

id.description: The toxicity list job identifier returned by Bouncer.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for retrieving the status of a Bouncer toxicity list job.

id.description: The toxicity list job identifier returned by Bouncer.

status.description: The toxicity list job status returned by Bouncer.

processed.description: The number of processed emails reported by Bouncer for the toxicity list job.

outputSchema.description: The normalized response returned by Bouncer for a toxicity list job status request.

actions.name: get_toxicity_list_results
actions.description: Download normalized results from a completed Bouncer toxicity list job.

id.description: The toxicity list job identifier returned by Bouncer.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for downloading Bouncer toxicity list results.

id.description: The toxicity list job identifier returned by Bouncer.

email.description: The email address returned by Bouncer toxicity list results.

toxicity.description: The toxicity score returned by Bouncer for the email address.

items.description: A toxicity list result row returned by Bouncer.

results.description: The toxicity list rows returned by Bouncer.

outputSchema.description: The normalized toxicity list results returned by Bouncer.

actions.name: verify_domain
actions.description: Verify one domain with Bouncer and inspect its DNS and catch-all signals.

domain.description: The domain name to verify with Bouncer.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for verifying a domain with Bouncer.

name.description: The domain name returned by Bouncer.

acceptAll.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

disposable.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

free.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

domain.description: The domain details returned by Bouncer.

type.description: The DNS record type returned by Bouncer.

record.description: The DNS record value returned by Bouncer.

dns.description: The DNS details returned by Bouncer.

provider.description: The provider name returned by Bouncer.

toxic.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

outputSchema.description: The domain verification result returned by Bouncer.

actions.name: verify_email
actions.description: Verify a single email address with Bouncer in real time.

email.description: The email address to verify with Bouncer.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for verifying a single email address with Bouncer.

email.description: The normalized email address returned by Bouncer.

status.description: The verification status returned by Bouncer.

reason.description: The provider reason returned by Bouncer.

score.description: The Bouncer quality score from 0 to 100.

toxic.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

name.description: The domain name returned by Bouncer.

acceptAll.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

disposable.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

free.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

domain.description: The domain details returned by Bouncer.

role.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

disabled.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

fullMailbox.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

account.description: The mailbox details returned by Bouncer.

type.description: The DNS record type returned by Bouncer.

record.description: The DNS record value returned by Bouncer.

dns.description: The DNS details returned by Bouncer.

provider.description: The provider name returned by Bouncer.

toxicity.description: The Bouncer toxicity score from 0 to 5.

outputSchema.description: The single-email verification result returned by Bouncer.

actions.name: verify_emails_batch_sync
actions.description: Verify multiple email addresses with Bouncer batch sync in a single request.

items.description: The email address to verify with Bouncer.

emails.description: The email addresses to verify with Bouncer.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for verifying multiple email addresses with Bouncer batch sync.

email.description: The normalized email address returned by Bouncer.

status.description: The verification status returned by Bouncer.

reason.description: The provider reason returned by Bouncer.

score.description: The Bouncer quality score from 0 to 100.

toxic.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

name.description: The domain name returned by Bouncer.

acceptAll.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

disposable.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

free.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

domain.description: The domain details returned by Bouncer.

role.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

disabled.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

fullMailbox.description: A tri-state value returned by Bouncer.

account.description: The mailbox details returned by Bouncer.

type.description: The DNS record type returned by Bouncer.

record.description: The DNS record value returned by Bouncer.

dns.description: The DNS details returned by Bouncer.

provider.description: The provider name returned by Bouncer.

toxicity.description: The Bouncer toxicity score from 0 to 5.

items.description: The single-email verification result returned by Bouncer.

results.description: The email verification results returned by Bouncer batch sync.

outputSchema.description: The batch sync verification results returned by Bouncer.
